title: Chart Type Selection Guide
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Data Visualization
description: Interactive decision tree guiding learners through data characteristic questions to recommend the best chart type for their visualization needs.

learningObjectives: Differentiate between chart types by analyzing data characteristics
Match visualization goals to appropriate chart types through guided decision-making

keyQuestions: What data characteristics make a bar chart more appropriate than a line chart?
When should you use a treemap instead of a pie chart?
How does the number of data series affect chart type selection?
commonMisconceptions: Pie charts work well with many categories
Bar charts and histograms are interchangeable
Line charts are appropriate for categorical data
assessmentOpportunities: Justification of chart choice based on data properties
